expectations.evidence: Section 1 states 'Quick Flow is selected' with reasoning: user provides a tech-spec-*.md file path matching the Quick Flow trigger, and says 'implement it' matching 'implement this spec'.

Section 2.2 shows a Read tool call for '_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/tech-spec-fix-login-validation.md' before any sub-agent is spawned, with the purpose to 'Parse the tech-spec to understand the change'.
No mention of sprint-status.yaml or epics.md anywhere in the execution plan. The startup sequence goes directly from TeamCreate to reading the tech-spec to knowledge base scan.

Section 3.1 spawns sub-agent named 'quick-developer' on team 'bmad-auto' with prompt that includes: Invoke the Skill tool with skill: 'bmad-quick-dev', args: '_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/tech-spec-fix-login-validation.md'.
Section 2.1 calls TeamCreate with team_name 'bmad-auto' as the very first startup step, before any sub-agents are spawned. Cited as 'Critical Rule #10'.
